__doc__: Maps each WeChat account's peer_id to its ChatGPT project home URL.
Copy this file to the persistent volume as browser_data/wechat_projects.json
and fill in the real peer_id keys and project_url values. Do NOT commit the
filled-in file (it contains private peer ids and project links).
- peer_id: the lane key webdock receives (see browser-status 'lanes').
- name: human label, used only in logs.
- project_url: the project HOME url, ending with /project. webdock navigates
here on the first message (creating a conversation) and remembers the
resulting /c/<id> in lane_state.json so later messages resume it.
Send '/新对话' from WeChat to start a fresh conversation inside the project.
